title: Test Suite KG Edge Row
description: Unified columnar schema for KG-regime data (regime=KG). One row = one typed edge with explicit source_resource tagging. The source_resource field is the primary distribution-shift axis for KG-regime data (which source contributed the edge).

edge_id.description: Stable hash of (head_id, relation, tail_id, source_resource) or UUID

relation.description: Typed relation; relation-type cardinality drives the typed (Ty) structural score

source_resource.description: The underlying database/curation the edge came from (PrimeKG's 20 sources, Hetionet's 29, etc.) — the primary distribution-shift axis for KG-regime data

env_id.description: If a non-source env axis applies (e.g., year for OGB-MAG); otherwise null
